Tunare's Request  

Description

1: Charm up to level 35

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 350 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 8 Recast Time: 24
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Magic
Range: 200 Location: Any
Time of Day: Any Fizzle Adj: 5
Deletable: No Dot Stacking: Yes
Reflectable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Animal
Spell Type: Detrimental Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on other: Soandso blinks.

Game Description

Beckons to the animals of the wild, allowing you to control them.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Tunare's Request

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Tunare's Request
ClassLevel
DRU55
Expansion:

Duration:
2 hour(s) 45.0 mins @L55 to 3 hour(s) 15.0 mins @L65
  • Comments (21)
  • Sold By (1)
  • Dropped By (16)
  • Crafted (1)
  • Screenshots

  • Spell: Tunare`s Request - Research 171
Post Comment
No point
QuoteReply
# May 21 2013 at 5:59 PM Rating: Decent
cardeonclarols
Scholar
75 posts
There is absolutely no point to this spell. The level 52 charm spell charms up to level 53 mobs. If your argument is: The charm lasts longer: No, just no. The only argument that would apply to is if you want a nearly permanent pet and low and behold: Boo-boo Bear(the Druid Bear Pet) is the same level as this charm, give or take 3 levels, so there's no legitimate point in investing in this spell, because Boo-boo Bear is a permanent pet, I wouldn't even waste money on it, just live with the 52 charm or Boo-boo Bear.
____________________________
"Some claim they wish to be enlightened or wish to experience Zen. This is an absurdity, you do not 'become' enlightened or 'experience' Zen. If you wish to be enlightened, BE." - Unknown
▲ Page top
No point
QuoteReply
# Aug 26 2013 at 4:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1671409143116
1 post
This spell was around before Boo Boo. So it has some function if you are on a pre-velious server.
▲ Page top
Tunare`s not Tunare's
QuoteReply
# Feb 25 2010 at 6:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1618186627876
Scholar
104 posts
If you are searching for this spell in the bazaar, make sure you use the 'Grave Accent' that is found on the tilde key on the keyboard. For whatever reason, it was not programmed with the apostrophe shared with the parenthesis key. Or you can just search for 'tunare'.

Use:

Tunare`s Request

NOT

Tunare's Request

Edited, Mar 9th 2010 12:39am by Harmoniq
▲ Page top
?spell makes no sense to me
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2006 at 5:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592272957495
176 posts
Why would I want to charm only up to level 35?When I can use other charm spell that charms stuff in PON?I'f I'm charming a level 35 most likelt theres no xp for me there.ok duration looks nice but thats about it.And for farming?Just blow quad nukes.So whats the point of this spell?
▲ Page top
RE: ?spell makes no sense to me
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2006 at 7:11 PM Rating: Decent
Kalysta
Scholar
1,087 posts
because when it came out, it was good.
Since druids weren't meant to be a pet class, it wasn't supposed to be a huge help. But fighting in places like burning woods, you could go to the other end of the zone and grab a charmable to go back and help you exp on the other side.
____________________________
Pain Mistress Okami L`Assundre of Tarew Marr
Dark Elf Shadow Knight
Drinal (Tarew)
Retired after 500 days /played
Deleted
http://eqplayers.station.sony.com/character_profile.vm?characterId=455266869792
Remade
http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=96950
Retired again
▲ Page top
Resisted by Stalkers
QuoteReply
# Sep 14 2004 at 7:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768513986
View User Forum
77 posts
Hi there! I'm a lvl 55 druid that was recently introduced to Plane of Nightmare and the Stalker camp (looks like werewolves). I have been successfully charming the Stalkers with Call of Karana (lvl 52 spell) which Allakhazam says has a duration of 16.6 mins @L52 to 20.5 mins @L65. HOWEVER, when I attempt to use Tunare's Request (lvl 55 spell), it has been getting resisted so far 100% of the time (and yes i'm using Glamore of Tunare to pull). Since the duration fo Tunare's Request is considerably longer (2 hour(s) 45.0 mins @L55 to 3 hour(s) 15.0 mins @L65), I would like to use this spell instead.

Does anyone know why Tunare's Request may be getting resisted so much?

Zacory
Wood Elf Druid of the 55th season
Maelin Starpyre
▲ Page top
Resisted by Stalkers
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2009 at 8:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591902677590
Scholar
26 posts
max level of mob you can charm with this spell is lev 35, PoN mobs are much higher level.
▲ Page top
RE: Resisted by Stalkers
QuoteReply
# Feb 03 2005 at 5:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781101573
View User Forum
Scholar
161 posts
The spoell initself last about 185 minutes on mobs up to lvl 35. When the charm breaks you get NO agro, wich can be a benefit.

However like any charm it can wear off prematurely limiting it's use compared to your behest wich is suprisingly also a lvl 35 pet.

It's as stated not usable for charming static ravens nor mobile ravens in PoN. You can use Tunbare's Command for the static ones or use the lvl63 command of karana to charm both.

Direcharm won't help you much in PoN as the only mobs are the level 46 bats wich can be charmed. Unles you are in a group where it is nice added dps and you don't have to worry about charmbreaks.
(small treefrogs in PoV are also nice to dc if you are in a group though mostly i only see it's undead cousin up)

Back to the value of this spell, it's quite limited and in my idea it's better to keep the money and save up for nature's behest since that is a permanent pet and you don't have to worry about charmbreaks nor finding a charmable mob. The only advantage i have seen so far is that some pets charmed with this spell seem to have a higher dps then our litle pet. Another advantage of our pet is that it can be summoned over the zone with summon companion while charmed mobs can't be summoned.

▲ Page top
RE: Resisted by Stalkers
QuoteReply
# Sep 14 2004 at 4:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768513986
View User Forum
77 posts
For some odd reason... I didn't see all the posts for this spell before my prior post. I suppose this being a spell that charms mobs up to lvl 35, kinda tells me this "upgrade" isn't so hot. I'll have to look forward to the next charm spell i guess.
▲ Page top
this sucks
QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2004 at 9:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592264671852
42 posts
actually, this would be a nice spell, if some of the posts below were true by now.
as of 7/14/04 a charmed griffawn in EK would break it before it gets to its first victim.

would be indeed very nice for farming if it lasted a fixed period. (the below mentioned 2h+)

it seems the info on eqdruids.com is true:
this is nothing but a usual charm spell that works on animals up to lvl 35. it also won't cause aggro after breaking, but which lvl 55 druid would have problems recharming a lvl 35 mob, whether it is attacking him or not??

spent 400pp on this spell (kd) and begin to regret it

Edited, Wed Jul 14 10:18:38 2004

124 posts
Dire charm is an AAXP ability, lv59 cost is 9aaxp.
▲ Page top
Tunares Request in PoN
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2003 at 3:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757475327
4 posts
Mobs in PoN are too high for TR. CoK or CoT are the only Druid spells that will charm Blood Ravens and Nightstalkers. Dire Charm works on the Young bats and does pretty well with buffs.

Gravmar Stormheart
62nd Druid of Tunare
▲ Page top
charming in PoN
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2003 at 1:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783441735
11 posts
i usually go to PoN solo when i can get the nightstalkers open to just me, charm one with the lvl 52 druid spell, then haste it, not i can normally kill 2 with that one and it still have a little bit of life left, just break charm and go charm another, you can get UBER xp this way as a druid. i went from lvl 59 to lvl 60 in just 8 hours doing this solo and mana was never a problem since all you have to do is a few points DD to each target your pet kills (druid root spell) can kill non stop as long as you have KEI and own the entire camp killing them as soon as they pop, not to mention all the phat gem drops you get to keep all to yourself like this =) but anyhow, i haven't tried to do aa's like this solo yet, when i do LOOK OUT should be amazing, just have 18aa's right now, gonna try to get 12 in one night like this sometime soon to top off another aa ability, hopefully it's duable


▲ Page top
Tunares Request
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2003 at 2:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784560484
10 posts
There's alot of confusion surrounding this spell. Can someone here clear it up?

Allakhazams, says spell lasts over 2 hours.

Castersrealm says 8 min.

Eqdruids says Unknown duration.

Posters here seem to be saying they use it on mobs in PoN and PoD.

Castersrealm and Eqdruids boards say spell will only charm up to lv 35 mobs and is totally useless because of that.

What gives?
▲ Page top
RE: Tunares Request
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2003 at 3:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1694391416187
129 posts
I think this spell just does not work, period. When I cast on mobs in Kedge, I get a response of...this spell is TOO HIGH for this creature...then the mob attacks! Yeah right!, i want to see Wizzy's get messages that say, "ice Comet is too high for this rat"

So, the spell does not work on high level creatures and does not work on low level creatures. Verant....YEAH YOU!...WHATS THE POINT?
▲ Page top
RE: Tunares Request
QuoteReply
# Mar 24 2003 at 11:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253189008
Scholar
44 posts
This charm last 2hr 45min. at lvl 55 and 3hr 15min. at lvl 65.

You can't charm anything over lvl 35 with it. Making it of a somewhat limited use.

It's a very nice spell to farm some crafting components in lower lvl zones, until you can get dire charm.
▲ Page top
add to Charm Killen
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2003 at 7:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245570499
32 posts
Most of the wandering Raven's are too high to charm I think, find the static spawns, I have been able to charm all of them

Charm Killing

# Jan 15 2003 at 7:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245570499
32 posts
I have a lvl 59 Druid and do it all day long,,, just keep Charm memed, have C3, PoTC and Form of the Howler up for max Mana Regen and its a Breeze,,, just remember, after about every two or three kills, hide to break mez and resnare.... wish I had Dire Charm :),,, then wouldn't have to worry about that :)

RE: ...
QuoteReply
# Jan 22 2003 at 11:52 PM Rating: Default
Lessw
View User Forum
Sage
97 posts
actualy yes its good exp for me at 61 in PoN kiting ravens. however the mana / time / exp ration is not as good as it is when a Chanter or shammy duo there with me, i have them Pull and i keep tabs on the pet and adds, i snare and root, and debuff(hand or Ro) thay Slow and debuff. with this tactic i can quite often get 2 to 3 aa in a night duoing there. (best i ever got in 1 long nite was 6 aa)

but u can NOT use Tunares request for this kind of charming, nor can u use DC. u have to use the 52 or 63 charm spells call of karana or Command of Tunare

now if i find this spot taken on Bertoxx every time i go there now after posting this im guna be pissed. this is my spot its like NEVER camped on bertoxx. and i almost never have to wait for repops.

i have goten over 50 AA's there in the last few weeks doing this and leveled a chanter friend to 57 from 46 here (Foxeyone)
